## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest -q`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check src tests`)
- [ ] If a Protocol interface was changed, all implementations are updated
- [ ] If a dependency was added/changed, `pyproject.toml` and `requirements.txt` are updated
- [ ] No new files committed that should be gitignored
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] `AGENT.md` updated if project status / decisions changed
